The [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] '''Avindia system''' contained a double [[Star/Legends|star]] called [[Avindia]] which was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Polus]]. Due to the orbit of Polus, there were only brief seasons during which the planet was warmed by both of the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] stars.

{{System-stub}}
